goomba.description: Short, ground-dwelling brown mushroom creature with a scowling face and triangular white eyes

red_koopa.description: Bipedal yellow turtle with a prominent red shell, large head, and oval eyes

buzzy_beetle.description: Short, ground-dwelling black-skinned creature encased in a smooth, domed blue shell

red_koopa_paratroopa.description: Bipedal yellow turtle with a red shell, large oval eyes, and a pair of white fluttering wings

green_koopa_paratroopa.description: Bipedal yellow turtle with a green shell, large oval eyes, and a pair of white fluttering wings

piranha_plant.description: Stationary green botanical enemy with a wide, toothy maw, emerging upward from a green pipe

green_koopa.description: Bipedal yellow turtle with a prominent green shell, large head, and oval eyes

hammer_bro.description: Aggressive, standing bipedal turtle wearing a white and blue helmet, actively throwing projectiles

lakitu.description: Bespectacled, green-faced creature hovering inside a smiling, white puffy cloud

spiny.description: Small, quadrupedal red creature covered in sharp, prominent white spikes across its back

bowser.description: Large, green, reptilian boss with a spiked shell, orange hair, and a roaring fire-breathing mouth

mushroom_powerup.description: Consumable item with a short white stalk and a bright orange-red cap adorned with white spots

fire_flower_powerup.description: Stationary flower with a central face, surrounded by alternating blinking petals of white, orange, and red

star_powerup.description: Dynamic, five-pointed star icon with eyes, continuously blinking between yellow and orange hues

one_up_powerup.description: Consumable item with a short white stalk and a distinct bright green cap adorned with white spots

coin.description: Small, gleaming gold oval or circular currency item with a distinctive inner marking
